### Security Release

Fixes an issue where sparse slice deserialization can cause memory exhaustion CVE-2024-37298

Thanks to [@​AlexVasiluta](https://togithub.com/AlexVasiluta) for the report and following responsible disclosure.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/gorilla/schema/compare/v1.4.0...v1.4.1

</details>
